{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged crimson claw
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] met a lightning attack with a [[Forged crimson claw]] from her weapon's [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
